claim: Agentic RAG solves three fundamental RAG limitations: inability to zoom out to full documents, poor handling of tabular data analysis, and weak cross-document context stitching.
actionable: Implement agentic RAG by adding multiple tools (document listing, file content retrieval, SQL querying) alongside traditional RAG lookup to enable agents to choose the best knowledge-access strategy per query.
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template

claim: Transaction Pooler (port 6543) must be used for PostgreSQL connections in n8n, not direct connection parameters, to avoid connection failures.
actionable: When setting up n8n PostgreSQL credentials for Supabase, select 'Transaction Pooler' from the connect dropdown and use port 6543 instead of default parameters.
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template

claim: Include metadata (file_id and file_title) in RAG embeddings so agents can cite sources and identify which document chunks came from.
actionable: When inserting documents into your vector store, attach file_id and file_title to chunk metadata; enable metadata return in your RAG retrieval tool so the agent receives source information.
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template

claim: Use the same embedding model for both RAG ingestion and retrieval to prevent dimension mismatch errors; embedding model dimensions must be consistent.
actionable: Store the embedding model name and verify at retrieval time that your agent uses the exact same model (e.g., text-embedding-3-small) for querying as used during document ingestion.
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template

claim: When updating files, delete and re-insert chunks instead of updating in-place to prevent stale chunks from old file versions remaining in the knowledge base.
actionable: Before ingesting an updated file, run a DELETE query filtering by file_id to clear all old chunks; then insert the new chunks fresh to ensure a clean state.
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template

claim: Store CSV/Excel table data in JSONB columns for SQL querying rather than creating a new SQL table per file, enabling flexible schema-per-file storage.
actionable: Use a single document_rows table with dataset_id (file_id) and row_data (JSONB); store CSV rows as JSON objects in row_data; define schemas in metadata to instruct agents how to query.
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template

claim: System prompts telling agents to 'be honest about not knowing' and avoid hallucination reduces false confidence in agentic RAG systems.
actionable: Include explicit instructions in the agent's system prompt: 'If you cannot find the answer from RAG or other tools, tell the user directly instead of making something up.'
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template

claim: Handle multiple simultaneous file ingestion by looping over trigger items instead of processing only the first file to avoid skipping batch uploads.
actionable: Wrap your file processing nodes in an n8n Loop node that iterates over all items in the trigger output, ensuring each file gets processed when multiple files enter simultaneously.
source_title: I Built the ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template
